memory.recent_lessons_md:
## Lessons — July 6, 2026

**3 Things That Worked:**
1. IBM rejection preserved capital — re-scored 6.17 (Accenture contagion) vs prior 7.67; correctly overrode binding score when new negative data arrived.
2. META re-pricing discipline — dropped target from $615 (July 1 peak) to $558 (midday) reflecting market rotation. Entry price discipline not chasing.
3. AMD unrealized hold above water — $506.76 fill → ~$525 EOD = +3.6% unrealized despite naked position risk.

**3 Things To Improve:**
1. API blockage Day 67 — paper-api.alpaca.markets still not in egress allowlist. Every missed trade traces here. 5-day deadline: if not resolved, operator reassess cloud environment viability.
2. AMD naked 15+ days — SELL 9sh + GTC stop must happen before July 7 open. Longest-running guardrail violation.
3. Midday COMPLETED heartbeat missing — routine STARTED but no COMPLETED log line. Ensure COMPLETE heartbeat fires in finally block.

## Lessons — July 3 (Holiday Confirmation)
Prior Pre-Market correctly confirmed July 4 holiday. No orders. All carry-forward bindings documented.

## Lessons — July 2 (Market-Close)
All 3 MOC attempts blocked. AMD still naked. Market closed for July 4. All bindings extended to July 6 opening.

## Lessons — July 1 (Afternoon)
AMD intraday high $584.73 EXCEEDED original take-profit $582.78 — position still naked, profit not locked. AMD Wells Fargo PT $615. IBM upgraded 7.67 on JPMorgan + NanoStack chip. META +10% on Bloomberg cloud story. TSLA skipped (Q2 delivery binary event).
